Notice Of Hearing On Third-Party Claim
Off Calendar Jun-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF Lucasfilm's hearing on third party claim. The Court finds that any interest of Karen Myers is subordinate to the claim of plaintiff. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents, Request For Sanctions; Separate Statement Re Compel Production Of Documents; Separate Statement Re Motion To Compel Deposition Testimony
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff LucasFilm's motion to compel further responses to deposition questions and to produce documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient time to complete the deposition. Responsive documents are to be provided at least 3 business days before the deposition. The Court finds that defendant made evasive responses and failed to produce relevant documents. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1040 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
